description_long: This object consists of two books, one closed and one open, both with visible covers and pages. The closed book features a dark cover with a classical painting-style illustration and bold, contrasting title text. The open book reveals printed pages with text and images, including a sepia-toned artwork and a grayscale photograph, suggesting a non-fiction or educational content. The book's pages appear to be made of standard paper, while the cover is likely a semi-glossy, flexible cardstock. The spine and back cover of the closed book are visible, showing additional text and a barcode. The overall appearance is that of a modern paperback book, suitable for reading or display in an urban environment.
description: A pair of paperback books, one open showing illustrated pages and one closed with a dark, illustrated cover and bold title text.
description_view_0: The open book displays two pages with text and images, while the closed book's front cover is fully visible, showcasing its artwork and title.
description_view_1: The back cover and spine of the closed book are visible, along with the edge of the open book's pages.
description_view_2: Both the back cover of the closed book and the open book's pages are seen from the side, highlighting the book's thickness and paper texture.
description_view_3: The open book's pages are prominent, with the closed book's front cover visible in the background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a classical painting-style illustration with several human figures, rendered in muted, realistic tones. The artwork appears to depict expressive faces and gestures, giving the cover a dramatic and historical feel.
attribute_title_text: The Human Side of BITCOIN & Cryptocurrencies
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark with light-colored text running vertically, matching the cover's color scheme. There are no visible decorative elements beyond the text.
